target_name: Solace Browser YinYang Service — Liveness Check (Northstar)
context: Northstar contract: YinYang service must be live before chat is possible. Tests /api/yinyang/status as the liveness proxy — if queue_size is present, the service is up and the notification pipeline is running. Elisabeth Hendrickson: the delight layer must be alive before it can delight. This is the canary that guards the chat endpoint.
